title: Automatic prompt caching long prompt probe

messages.content: Provider-diff cache probe. Repeatable context block: compatibility testing records whether request fields are supported, ignored, or rejected. expect.notes: Automatic prompt caching may show cached_tokens on repeated identical calls; this case does not assert a cache hit.
